'''loyadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaffy|chaffy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-y-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaffy|chaffy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| loyadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:loyadithi|loyadithi]] || [[word:loyadiji|loyadiji]] || [[word:loyadishi|loyadishi]] || [[word:loyadiki|loyadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:loyaduthuthu|loyaduthuthu]] || [[word:loyadujuju|loyadujuju]] || [[word:loyadushushu|loyadushushu]] || [[word:loyadukuku|loyadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:loyaduthu|loyaduthu]] || [[word:loyaduju|loyaduju]] || [[word:loyadushu|loyadushu]] || [[word:loyaduku|loyaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:loyadufthuf|loyadufthuf]] || [[word:loyadufjuf|loyadufjuf]] || [[word:loyadufshuf|loyadufshuf]] || [[word:loyadufkuf|loyadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:loyadethe|loyadethe]] || [[word:loyadeje|loyadeje]] || [[word:loyadeshe|loyadeshe]] || [[word:loyadeke|loyadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:loyadothotho|loyadothotho]] || [[word:loyadojojo|loyadojojo]] || [[word:loyadoshosho|loyadoshosho]] || [[word:loyadokoko|loyadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:loyadotho|loyadotho]] || [[word:loyadojo|loyadojo]] || [[word:loyadosho|loyadosho]] || [[word:loyadoko|loyadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:loyadofthof|loyadofthof]] || [[word:loyadofjof|loyadofjof]] || [[word:loyadofshof|loyadofshof]] || [[word:loyadofkof|loyadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:loyadÃŸfthÃŸf|loyadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:loyadÃŸfjÃŸf|loyadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:loyadÃŸfshÃŸf|loyadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:loyadÃŸfkÃŸf|loyadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:loyadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|loyadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:loyadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|loyadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:loyadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|loyadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:loyadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|loyadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:loyadÃŸfthÃŸf|loyadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:loyadÃŸfjÃŸf|loyadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:loyadÃŸfshÃŸf|loyadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:loyadÃŸfkÃŸf|loyadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:loyadÃŸfthÃŸf|loyadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:loyadÃŸfjÃŸf|loyadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:loyadÃŸfshÃŸf|loyadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:loyadÃŸfkÃŸf|loyadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:loyadÃḊthÃḊ|loyadÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:loyadÃḊjÃḊ|loyadÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:loyadÃḊshÃḊ|loyadÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:loyadÃḊkÃḊ|loyadÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:loyadathatha|loyadathatha]] || [[word:loyadajaja|loyadajaja]] || [[word:loyadashasha|loyadashasha]] || [[word:loyadakaka|loyadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:loyadatha|loyadatha]] || [[word:loyadaja|loyadaja]] || [[word:loyadasha|loyadasha]] || [[word:loyadaka|loyadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:loyadafthaf|loyadafthaf]] || [[word:loyadafjaf|loyadafjaf]] || [[word:loyadafshaf|loyadafshaf]] || [[word:loyadafkaf|loyadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:loyadasha|loyadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:loyadshÃḋsha|loyadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:loyadrosha|loyadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:loyadmusha|loyadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:loyadyasha|loyadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goloyadnkshÃḋsha|goloyadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goloyadnkrosha|goloyadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goloyadnkmusha|goloyadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goloyadnkyasha|goloyadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:loyayadasha|loyayadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:loyayadshÃḋsha|loyayadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:loyayadrosha|loyayadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:loyayadmusha|loyayadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:loyayadyasha|loyayadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goloyayadnkshÃḋsha|goloyayadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goloyayadnkrosha|goloyayadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goloyayadnkmusha|goloyayadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goloyayadnkyasha|goloyayadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:leyÃḊdasha|leyÃḊdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:leyÃḊdshÃḋsha|leyÃḊdshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:leyÃḊdrosha|leyÃḊdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:leyÃḊdmusha|leyÃḊdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:leyÃḊdyasha|leyÃḊdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goleyÃḊdnkshÃḋsha|goleyÃḊdnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goleyÃḊdnkrosha|goleyÃḊdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goleyÃḊdnkmusha|goleyÃḊdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goleyÃḊdnkyasha|goleyÃḊdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:loyfadasha|loyfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:loyfadshÃḋsha|loyfadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:loyfadrosha|loyfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:loyfadmusha|loyfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:loyfadyasha|loyfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goloyfadnkshÃḋsha|goloyfadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goloyfadnkrosha|goloyfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goloyfadnkmusha|goloyfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goloyfadnkyasha|goloyfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
